overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval cobblestone town at night. The character moves from a waterfront promenade through narrow streets and a town square toward a fortified castle area, passing various NPCs and guards along the way.

events.description: passing by a canvas-covered market stall on the right side
character turns left to ascend the cobblestone slope away from the waterfront

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the waterfront path, swords visible on his back, approaching a group of guards

notable_agents.action: group of guards in red armor standing near the path intersection

entered.detail: large stone arch bridge spanning the water in the background
curved stone retaining wall along the right side of the path
half-timbered medieval building with wooden beams
wooden vendor stall with canvas canopy and barrels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cobblestone waterfront promenade at night. Geralt walks past a wooden tavern on the left and a market stall on the right, with a large stone bridge visible in the distant background. The path curves along a stone wall as the character approaches a group of guards standing near the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cobblestone path ascending the hill

events.description: passing through a stone gate structure with wooden doors

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking uphill along the winding cobblestone path, following guards in red armor

notable_agents.action: guards in red armor walking ahead up the slope

entered.detail: arched stone gateway with heavy wooden doors marking the entrance to the upper town
tall stone tower visible against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a winding cobblestone path ascending a hill. Geralt follows guards in red armor up the slope, passing through a stone gate structure. The stone bridge and market stall from the waterfront disappear from view as a distant tower becomes visible against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow merchant street with wooden buildings

events.description: passing a building with glowing red windows casting warm light on the street
emerging from narrow street into open town square with increased crowd density

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through narrow streets past merchants and townspeople, entering a crowded square

notable_agents.action: merchant leaning over a wooden stall arranging goods

entered.detail: tightly packed half-timbered houses with overhanging upper floors
wooden structure with distinctive crimson glowing windows
open cobblestone plaza with scattered market stalls and gathering townspeople

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through narrow merchant streets lined with half-timbered buildings. A building with glowing red windows provides warm contrast to the cool night. The character emerges into a bustling town square where the crowd density increases significantly, with townspeople milling about the open cobblestone plaza.

events.description: approaching the large fortress building with red banners at the edge of the square

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the town square toward the imposing fortress structure, passing various townspeople

notable_agents.action: townsperson in brown cloak walking in the same direction toward the fortress

entered.detail: massive dark stone fortress with red banners and illuminated windows dominating the skyline
tall spired tower visible behind the fortress structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt crossing the open town square toward an imposing fortress with red banners and glowing windows. The merchant buildings fall away as the massive stone structure looms larger. A clock tower is visible in the distance behind the fortress as the character approaches the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a low-lying waterfront promenade up toward a fortified hillside elevation at night. It begins on a cobblestone path where Geralt walks past a wooden tavern and market stalls, with a large stone bridge framing the distant background. As the path curves along a stone wall, the camera follows the character toward a group of guards stationed at an intersection. The scene then shifts as the terrain ascends a winding slope, moving through a stone gate structure while the waterfront landmarks fade from view. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a distant tower silhouetted against the dark sky as Geralt follows guards in red armor further up the hill.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of narrow merchant streets into the expansive scale of a fortified castle district. It begins by trailing Geralt through tight alleys lined with half-timbered buildings, where the cool night air is punctuated by the warm glow of red windows. As the character moves forward, the narrow corridor opens into a bustling town square filled with a dense crowd of townspeople milling across the cobblestone plaza. The scene then shifts as the merchant buildings fall away, allowing an imposing stone fortress with red banners and glowing windows to loom larger in the frame. Finally, the camera advances toward the fortress entrance, revealing a distant clock tower standing behind the massive structure.
